mappings.notes: The repo records risk context through ADRs, runbooks, plans, and generated reports, but reviewer policy and immutable audit retention are not yet codified.
mappings.gapSummary: Add policy-as-code reviewer gates and centralized immutable audit retention for security-relevant decisions.

mappings.standardControlTitle: Manage identities for people and machines
mappings.notes: CI identities use GitHub OIDC and repository-scoped trust; human AWS and Kubernetes operator access are not yet fully codified.
mappings.gapSummary: Define IAM Identity Center permission sets, EKS access entries, and Kubernetes RBAC for human operators.

mappings.standardControlTitle: Manage permissions with least privilege boundaries
mappings.notes: Permission boundaries and dedicated IRSA roles exist for automation and controllers, but some policies require wildcard AWS API scope and application service accounts need explicit token restrictions.
mappings.gapSummary: Codify policy-as-code checks, complete workload service accounts, and tighten any remaining trust-policy conditions.

mappings.notes: CloudWatch pod log delivery, monitoring dashboards, runbooks, and workflow logs provide evidence, but alert-to-incident routing and immutable audit retention remain incomplete.
mappings.gapSummary: Add centralized audit retention, alert routing, and an authorized remediation workflow.

mappings.notes: Namespace-scoped Gateway attachment is implemented, but the dev EKS public endpoint accepts broad access for hosted runners and admin surfaces still need SSO/source restrictions.
mappings.gapSummary: Restrict EKS API access to private runners or narrow CIDRs and add SSO/IP controls to admin surfaces.

mappings.notes: Images are built from trusted main-branch content and published with immutable tags, while vulnerability scans are advisory-only and admission/RBAC policy is missing.
mappings.gapSummary: Gate high-risk CVEs, add admission controls, and make workload token posture explicit.

mappings.standardControlTitle: Protect data and secrets at rest
mappings.notes: Terraform state access is split by role and generated admin passwords are sensitive outputs, but application secrets remain in Git and rotation is not codified.
mappings.gapSummary: Move secrets to Secrets Manager/KMS-backed delivery, reduce state sensitivity, and codify rotation/revocation.

mappings.notes: Runbooks, logs, dashboards, and AIOps investigation support diagnosis, but there is no closed-loop alert-to-remediation process yet.
mappings.gapSummary: Define incident channels, escalation ownership, and authorized remediation records.
